title: Apply: Healthy Canadians and Communities Fund - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply: Healthy Canadians and Communities Fund
- Advanced screening form application
- Webinar for applicants

## Advanced screening form application
You must apply through our online portal.
If you do not yet have an account, you will need to create one. Once you have used this account to log in, you will then be able to access and review the advanced screening form questions and complete it.
Applications don't have to be completed in one sitting. You and your colleagues will be able to save your progress at any point and return to it later.
The advanced screening form is meant to be brief, clear and concise so that we can assess your project idea. We will not look at any links to external websites included in textboxes. You can summarize points within your application from any additional materials.
Ensure that your account information and all forms are complete and up to date before submitting.

## Webinar for applicants
We recommend that you attend the Healthy Canadians and Communities Fund live webinar for applicants on November 23, 2022 at 1 pm EST. Please note that we will be recording this webinar. By participating in the webinar you are agreeing to have your image and voice recorded.
